name: Capacent Holding AB (publ)
summary: Capacent Holding AB (publ) provides consulting services to industrial and service companies, B2B and B2C, private equity firms, financial institutions, and public sector entities. Its services include strategy and organization, finance and performance management, operations excellence, working capital management, market and customer excellence, pricing and revenue management, and business analytics. The company was formerly known as ABB Financial Consulting. Capacent Holding AB (publ) is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
